field_of_view_deg: 138 horizontal / 114 vertical / 155 diagonal (main camera); 97.5 horizontal / 79.4 vertical / 118.2 diagonal (package camera)

power.method: 16-24V AC, 1.25A max, 50/60Hz OR 5V DC, 2A via USB-C power cable; PoE only via optional UACC-Adapter-DBPOE accessory; 10W max

features: dual-camera design: main camera + dedicated package-detection camera
NFC card & keyfob access, two-way intercom & doorbell access
no native PoE port -- requires the optional UACC-Adapter-DBPOE accessory for PoE/Ethernet; native power is 16-24V AC doorbell wiring or USB-C

home_assistant.notes: Native UniFi Protect integration. Requires UniFi Protect console.

blue_iris.notes: Use Generic/RTSP profile with RTSPS URL from UniFi Protect. Requires Protect RTSP stream enabled per camera.
